text: Subchapter D (Legislative Finding and Intent) , Chapter 316 (Appropriations) , Government Code, and Section 403.095 (Use of Dedicated Revenue) , Government Code, do not apply to the fund created under Section 1001.151 (Texas Department of Motor Vehicles Fund) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 1001. Org. of Dept.
##### § 1001.153 — Applicability of Other Law

Subchapter D (Legislative Finding and Intent) , Chapter 316 (Appropriations) , Government Code, and Section 403.095 (Use of Dedicated Revenue) , Government Code, do not apply to the fund created under Section 1001.151 (Texas Department of Motor Vehicles Fund) .

*Added by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1287 (H.B.2202), Sec. 71, eff. September 1, 2013.*
